Lightweight Waterproof Sports Fitness Drawstring Backpack

Lightweight Waterproof Sports Fitness Drawstring Backpack: Crafted from premium Oxford cloth, this backpack is durable, waterproof, and built to last. The thickened, adjustable drawstring shoulder straps reduce strain and ensure a comfortable fit, with a convenient drawstring closure for easy access to your belongings. The main compartment easily holds clothes, shoes, towels, and daily essentials, while an external zipper pocket keeps keys, IDs, and wallets secure. Ultra-lightweight and foldable, it’s effortless to carry on the go. Perfect for fitness, sports, yoga, dance, travel, camping, and training, it also makes a great holiday gift for family and friends. Upgrade to larger capacity by contacting customer service; rush service is available for quick needs. Ideal for camping, beach trips, health and fitness activities, anniversaries, and holidays—meet all your sports and storage requirements with this versatile drawstring backpack.

Lightweight Waterproof Sports Fitness Drawstring Backpack with Oxford cloth, durable, adjustable straps, main compartment, external pocket, ideal for sports, travel, and gifting.

Our drawstring backpack is crafted from top - notch Oxford cloth. It's tough, waterproof, and built to last. The thickened drawstring eases shoulder strain, and the drawstring closure makes grabbing your stuff a breeze. The shoulder straps are adjustable to fit your comfort needs.The main compartment can hold clothes, shoes, towels, and all your daily essentials. There's an external zipper pocket for keys, ID cards, wallets, and the like. It's ultra - light and foldable, so it's a cinch to carry around.This drawstring backpack is ideal for fitness, sports, yoga, dance, travel, camping, training-you name it! It also makes a perfect holiday gift for family and friends.It can be upgraded to a larger capacity. Just hit up our customer service for the deets.
This drawstring backpack is the ideal choice for all your sports and fitness storage requirements.Rush service is available.
1 color, 1 side, 1 location printing. Free shipping for orders over 33 lbs
